briefing.headline: Your week in geopolitics.
briefing.summary: From your lens as a investor tracking policy, the desk surfaced 8 stories that matter most to your briefing. Leading threads include: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire; Walkers sick after drinking river water on the West Highland Way. Prioritize what changes decisions you own; treat the rest as peripheral scan.
briefing.keySignal: Dominant theme · Geopolitics: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
